untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decile-based cross-sectional sorting (long bottom volatility decile vs short top volatility decile). This is a portfolio-level ranking operation that cannot be expressed as point-in-time indicator conditions on individual securities. The available indicators only support univariate thresholds, not relative ranking across a universe. Backtest engine would need explicit decile construction logic at the portfolio level.
translation_notes: SSRN_980865_7 is a classic low-volatility anomaly strategy requiring ex-ante volatility calculation and cross-sectional decile assignment. While hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) is available, it cannot replicate the decile-sorting mechanism. Implementation requires: (1) calculating volatility for all stocks in universe, (2) assigning to deciles monthly, (3) longing D1 and shorting D10. Standard backtesting condition syntax is insufficient for this strategy.
